title: Default and adjustable outlet water temperature

title: Maximum height difference for water supply
summary: Maximum height difference H between highest faucet and unit is 4m for low-head models and 8m for high-head models.

title: Minimum inlet water pressure
summary: Inlet water pressure to the heat pump must be at least 0.15 MPa; otherwise, a booster pump is required.
evidence_quote: 当进热泵主机的自来水压不足0.15MPa时， 请在进水管上增加一进水增压泵，使进水压力不低于 0.15MPa。

title: E0: Water inlet pressure fault
summary: E0 indicates inlet water pressure is below 0.15 MPa. Causes include low water supply, closed valve, clogged filter, or faulty pressure switch.

causes: 机组外部进水管或过滤器堵塞
solutions: 清洗管道或过滤器滤网

evidence_quote:
E0 进水压力小于0.15MPa 自来水水压不足 增加冷水增压水泵
进水阀门未打开 打开阀门
机组外部进水管或过滤器堵塞 清洗管道或过滤器滤网
水压开关故障（实测高于0.15MPa） 更换水压开关

title: E2: Communication fault
summary: E2 indicates communication fault between main unit and wired controller. Check wiring or use shielded cable.

causes: 主机与线控器A、B、P、Q、E 线正确连接
电磁干扰，通讯线未用屏蔽线

E2 通讯故障 主机与线控器A、B、P、Q、E 线正确连接
电磁干扰，通讯线未用屏蔽线 通讯线改用屏蔽线

title: P1: System high pressure protection
summary: P1 indicates system high pressure. In direct heating mode, check filter, water inlet valve, or warm water valve. In circulation mode, check pump.

causes: 直热式: 机组内部过滤器脏赌，进水电磁阀动作不良，温水阀没有打开
循环式: 水泵没有启动
solutions: 清理脏物，检查进水电磁阀SV4，检查温水阀

evidence_quote:
P1 系统高压保护 直热式 机组内部过滤器脏赌，流径板换水量不够。 清理脏物（并安装过滤器）
进水电磁阀动作不良，没有水流径板换。 检查进水电磁阀 SV4
温水阀没有打开 检查温水阀
循环式 水泵没有启动 检查内置水泵

title: P2: Compressor current protection (over 18A)
summary: P2 indicates compressor current exceeded 18A. Check voltage or compressor for locked rotor.
evidence_quote:
P2 压缩机电流保护（超过 18A） 电压偏小 解决电压问题
压缩机堵转 检查压缩机

title: Component operation during direct heating mode
summary: In direct heating mode, compressor and 4-way valve are ON, SV1 OFF, EEV regulated, SV3 ON, SV4 OFF, SV5 OFF, pump controlled by pressure/flow.

components.EEV: 根据出水温度和设定温度调节
components.pump: 由出水压力、水流开关控制

evidence_quote: 直热式制热水 ON OFF 根据出水温度和设定温度调节 OFF ON OFF 由出水压力、水流开关控制（低于最低水位强制停）

title: Component operation during circulation heating mode
summary: In circulation heating mode, compressor and 4-way valve are ON, SV1 OFF, EEV set to zero, SV3 OFF, SV4 ON, SV5 OFF, pump ON.
evidence_quote: 循环式制热水 ON OFF T4≤10 OFF 置零关闭 ON OFF OFF ON

title: Component operation during defrost
summary: During defrost, compressor and 4-way valve are ON, SV1 ON, EEV holds current opening, SV3 OFF, SV4 OFF, SV5 OFF, pump controlled by pressure/flow.

components.pump: 由出水压力、水流开关控制

evidence_quote: 化霜过程中 ON ON ON 保持当前开度 OFF OFF OFF 由出水压力、水流开关控制（低于最低水位强制停）

title: Component operation during freeze protection
summary: During freeze protection, compressor and 4-way valve are OFF, SV1 OFF, EEV set to zero, SV3 ON, SV4 OFF, SV5 OFF, pump ON.
evidence_quote: 防冻结 OFF OFF OFF 置零关闭 ON OFF OFF ON

title: Component operation during standby
summary: In standby, compressor and 4-way valve are OFF, SV1 OFF, EEV set to zero, SV3 OFF, SV4 OFF, SV5 OFF, pump controlled by pressure/flow.

components.pump: 由出水压力、水流开关控制

evidence_quote: 待机 OFF OFF OFF 置零关闭 OFF OFF OFF 由出水压力、水流开关控制（低于最低水位强制停）

title: Maximum refrigerant pipe length and bends for KRSJ-50/400XH
summary: Indoor-outdoor refrigerant pipe total length max 10m, bends max 8. Insulation thickness ≥9mm.
evidence_quote: 室内外机冷媒连接铜管总长最长不超过 10m，弯曲数不大于 8。冷媒连接管外进行保温处理（厚度 9mm以上）。

title: Additional refrigerant charge for pipe length over 5m
summary: For pipe length over 5m, add 15g per meter. Formula: (L-5)×15g.
evidence_quote: 当室内外机冷媒连接铜管超过 5m时，需追加冷媒，追加量按超过 5m部分每米追加 15g。即：(L-5) ×15g

title: Minimum slope for condensate drain pipe
summary: Condensate drain pipe must have a slope of at least 1/100 (1cm per meter).
evidence_quote: 排水管必须要保持 1/100 以上的落水斜度。

title: Power wiring for KRSJ-50/400XH
summary: Power supply 220V～50Hz, outdoor power wire 2.5 mm², indoor-outdoor communication wire 1 mm², manual switch/fuse 30/25A, leakage protector 30mA/0.1s.

title: E0: Water flow detection fault (KRSJ-D series)
summary: E0 indicates water flow detection fault (inlet pressure <1.5 kg or no water). Check water supply, valve, or blockage.

causes: 机组外部进水管阀门没有打开

evidence_quote:
E0 水流检测故障 说明机组进水管水压小于 1.5 公斤或者没有水。
a、自来水水压不足。可能由于楼层高供水不足，或此时用水高峰，导致水压偏小。   解决方法：进水管加一增压泵。 b、机组外部进水管阀门没有打开。  解决方法：打开
阀门。
c、机组外部进水管堵塞。  解决方法：清除堵塞或更换水管。

与室外机） a、 通讯线P、Q、E 是否连接正确，有无松动。 b、 线控器电源是否正常，检查从主机接出的 5V 电源线连接是否正确、有无松动。

summary: Eb indicates communication fault between indoor and outdoor units. Check shielded cable and P,Q,E connections.

causes: 内机与主机之间通讯线是否为三芯屏蔽线
通讯线P、Q、E 是否连接正确，有无松动

title: P0: System low pressure protection (KRSJ-D series)
summary: P0 indicates system low pressure. Check for refrigerant leak or low pressure switch.
evidence_quote: P0 系统低压保护 机组内部安装了高、低压表接头，用压力表测量机组系统低压，确认机组是否冷媒泄漏掉。 a、 如是泄漏，则抽空补冷媒，按铭牌冷媒充注量加冷媒。 b、 如无泄漏，则检查低压

title: P1: System high pressure protection (KRSJ-D series)
summary: P1 indicates system high pressure. In direct heating, check SV1, warm water valve, filter. In circulation, check pump. In cooling, check outdoor fan.

causes: 直热式: 进水电磁阀SV1未打开，温水阀故障或脏堵
循环式: 水泵未开启
制冷模式: 外风机故障

evidence_quote:
P1 系统高压保护 1 直热式制热水模式下：
a、 查进水电磁阀 SV1是否打开。
b、 检查温水阀是否运行正常。开压缩机的同时，用手触摸此阀，正常时会明显感觉到在动作。重复上电、断电两、三次。 c、 检查温水阀是否脏堵。施工后第一次运行，自来水管里可能有小杂物堵在温水阀前过滤器里，在进水阀及温水阀正常开启的前提下，出水量非常小，或者无出水导致高压保护。 2 循环式制热水模式下，水泵没有开启，会导致机组高压保护。 说明：直热式制热水模式下，机组内部进水阀、温水阀及脏堵现象，会导致机组高压保护。 3 制冷模式下，外风机故障会导致组高压保护。

title: P2: System current protection (KRSJ-D series)
summary: P2 indicates system current protection. Check voltage or power wiring.

causes: 电压偏小、电源线太长，太细

evidence_quote: P2 系统电流保护 电压偏小、电源线太长，太细

title: P5: T3 high temperature protection (KRSJ-D series)
summary: P5 indicates T3 high temperature protection. Check outdoor fan and coil cleanliness.

causes: 风扇是否正常开启，翅片是否脏污

evidence_quote: P5 T3 高温保护 风扇是否正常开启，翅片是否脏污。

title: P8: Outlet water temperature too high protection (KRSJ-D series)
summary: P8 indicates outlet water temperature too high. Check water flow and inlet valve.

causes: 水流量偏小、进水管上阀门未正常开启

evidence_quote: P8 出水温度过高保护 水流量偏小、进水管上阀门未正常开启

title: P9: Discharge high temperature protection (KRSJ-D series)
summary: P9 indicates discharge high temperature protection. Check electronic expansion valve and refrigerant leak.

causes: 电子膨胀阀是否正常开启，冷媒是否泄漏
solutions: 检查电子膨胀阀和冷媒

evidence_quote: P9 排气高温保护 电子膨胀阀是否正常开启，冷媒是否泄漏

title: Pb: Freeze protection (normal state) (KRSJ-D series)
summary: Pb indicates freeze protection, which is a normal state, not a fault.

structured_payload.note: 正常保护，不是故障代码

evidence_quote: Pb 防冻结保护 正常保护

title: dF: Defrost code (normal state) (KRSJ-D series)
summary: dF indicates defrost, which is a normal state, not a fault.

structured_payload.note: 正常状态显示，不是故障代码

evidence_quote: Pb防冻保护代码、dF 除霜代码，这两个代码不是故障代码，是正常状态显示。
